content:
The public invoice page and payment upload flow (UI-001) have been implemented. 
- Booking submission now redirects to the invoice page.
- Created `src/app/booking/invoice/[kodeBooking]/page.tsx` with event details and payment instructions.
- Implemented public APIs for fetching booking data and uploading payment proof.
- Verified with `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.
The task is marked as complete in STATUS.md.
